'''Aradian''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Lianna system/Legends|Lianna system]] known for its [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] technology. The planet had an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] mildly poisonous to most aliens, and it was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by three [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}
